Package org.areslib.hardware.wrappers

Class SrsHubEncoderWrapper

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.hardware.wrappers.SrsHubEncoderWrapper
All Implemented Interfaces:
AresAbsoluteEncoder, AresEncoder
public class SrsHubEncoderWrapper extends Object implements AresAbsoluteEncoder
Optional Wrapper for the SRSHub driver using reflection.
